name: org.openrewrite.csharp.sln.RemoveNjsprojFromSolution
displayName: Remove projects from solution by extension
description: Removes Project entries with a matching file extension (e.g., `.njsproj`) from Visual Studio Solution (.sln/.slnx) files, plus associated ProjectConfigurationPlatforms and NestedProjects entries. Default extension is `.njsproj` (Node.js Tools projects, which `dotnet build` cannot process).
